What They Offer: 18-24mo training. 500+ dogs placed. Free vet care + monthly check-ins. Prison training partnership.

What They Offer: 18-22mo training. 1 of <150 ADI orgs worldwide. Free to TX veterans.

What They Offer: ADI-accredited. Anti-guarding training philosophy for PTSD dogs.

What They Offer: No service-date restrictions. Customized training. Lifetime support.
